ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was last sold */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "mls_id" TEXT /* Multiple Listing Service (MLS) ID for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage the agent belongs to */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., Springfield, IL) */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend data */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the market */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous trend */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
